task_completion.description: Verify that the global HTTPS-Only Mode setting remains enabled in Tor Browser.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Tor Browser Settings (Privacy & Security), the option for 'Enable HTTPS-Only Mode in all windows' (or similar global HTTPS-Only setting) should be selected/toggled on.

task_completion.description: Verify that a permanent exception was created for http://neverssl.com.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'HTTPS-Only Mode Exceptions' or 'Manage Exceptions' dialog in Tor Browser settings should list 'http://neverssl.com' or 'neverssl.com' with the status set to 'Off' or 'Allow', indicating HTTPS is not forced for this site.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent navigated to the target legacy site.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Tor Browser address bar should show 'neverssl.com' (or 'http://neverssl.com') and the main content of the NeverSSL website should be visible in the viewport, without showing an HTTPS-Only Mode warning page.

task_completion.description: Verify that the site was bookmarked.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The bookmark star icon in the Tor Browser address bar should be filled/highlighted, or the 'Edit Bookmark' dialog/popup should be visible.

task_completion.description: Verify that the bookmark title is exactly 'Legacy Target'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Edit Bookmark' popup, bookmark sidebar, or bookmark library must show the name/title of the bookmark for neverssl.com as exactly 'Legacy Target'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the actual Tor Browser application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the genuine Tor Browser interface (tabs, address bar, application menu) rather than a text editor or terminal modifying configuration files directly.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use a temporary session-based exception.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should not be seen clicking 'Continue to HTTP Site' on the Tor Browser HTTPS-Only Mode warning screen, as this only creates a temporary exception.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the browser settings GUI to create the permanent exception.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be screenshots showing the Tor Browser 'about:preferences' or Settings tab, specifically the Privacy & Security section and the Exceptions dialog.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target domain is 'neverssl.com'. The exact URL to be excepted and navigated to is 'http://neverssl.com/'. The expected bookmark title is exactly 'Legacy Target'.
